notes: Minimum Detectable Effect per metric: the smallest change that is worth calling a result. A/B
verdicts require BOTH statistical significance (Welch t / nonparametric separation) AND a delta
>= this floor, so we never ship a statistically-significant-but-trivial finding. 'path' picks the
ab_stats route: parametric (FPS) vs count (heavy-tailed events). 'direction' up=higher-is-better,
neutral=context-only (never a goal). These are PROPOSED floors pending owner sign-off (see the
autopilot spec open-decisions); until confirmed, treat as advisory defaults.
